title: TCUI to MEUI Migration Guide
content:
## Overview
This guide addresses common issues when migrating questionnaires from TCUI to MEUI interface.

## Common Issues
1. Layout misalignment after migration
2. Missing form fields
3. Validation errors on previously working forms

## Solutions
1. Clear browser cache after migration
2. Verify all custom CSS is MEUI-compatible
3. Test all form validations in MEUI environment

## Crisis Prevention
- Always backup questionnaire configurations before migration
- Test in staging environment first
- Have rollback plan ready
source: Generated from an advisor's 'TCUI to MEUI' group + 15 similar AI-detected tickets

title: Post-Upgrade Historical Data Validation
content:
## Critical Steps After Upgrade
1. Run data validation scripts immediately
2. Check questionnaire response integrity
3. Verify historical reports still function

## Known Issues
- Date fields may show incorrect timezone
- Numeric responses may lose precision
- Multi-select fields may be corrupted

## Emergency Contacts
- Data Team: ext 5555
- DBA On-Call: ext 5556
source: Generated from crisis pattern analysis across 34 tickets

title: Site-Level Questionnaire Configuration
content:
## Configuration Steps
1. Access Site Admin > Questionnaires
2. Select 'Site-Specific Settings'
3. Configure required fields

## Common Mistakes
- Not setting proper permissions
- Forgetting to activate after configuration
- Missing required field mappings
source: Generated from Cluster 0 (74 tickets) + an advisor's configuration group
